title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: "Share Data" toggle remains persistently ON after app restart when enabled during onboarding on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time and complete the onboarding flow.
2. On the onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
3. Tap the "Share Data" toggle to enable it (select any location permission option if prompted).
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Verify the "Share Data" toggle is ON and the correct description is displayed.
6. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
8. Observe the state of the "Share Data" toggle.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle remains persistently ON after restarting the app.
